what_it_does: A capture (2026-06-12) recording where three independent 'rays' (three sibling seed-capture documents/sessions) converge on Tim Geldard's geometric object. It lists located independent convergences, the fusions formed by joining the located parts, this session's own generated extensions (B4-B6, flagged for Tim's fit-test), and operational notes — all under an expand-before-harden, nothing-ratified discipline.
observations: Names the three rays: the INSTRUMENT (geometric-substrate + growth-rounds), the ENCODING (geldard-lattice), and the LAWS (CONVERGENCE-OBJECT), framing itself as the designed convergence path.

Located convergences include three independent derivations of the sqrt2/(1,1) forbidden point and a claim that 'new types are born at deep holes' was independently re-derived (corroboration, marked with a star).

Fusions include 'Resistance is storable; relevance never is' (resistance is centre-independent -> compute+cache; relevance is centre-dependent -> read-time only), refining the store-positions/compute-perspectives law.
Fuses chain=Morton-path=address across all three rays ('store-path and recall-path = one tree, opposite directions').
Claims resolve(centre, spaces, n, k, audience, exhale) already contained the laws' variables, written days before the transmission.

This ray's own generations: B4 triangulation-is-parallax (sessions as eyes measuring the object's depth), B5 the-wave-is-radial (log-polar kinematics, approach to centre), B6 the-involuntary-axis (time as the one axis the centre moves along without choice).
Operational section notes registry caution: embed-pplx / embed-jina-v4 rows are LIVE and verified — read whole rows before touching shared registries.
Closes reaffirming nothing is ratified and B4/B5/B6 are explicitly flagged for Tim's fit-test.
standouts: B4: 'TRIANGULATION IS PARALLAX' — a session is a centre, one centre cannot perceive depth, so differences between rays are the only instrument that can measure the object's depth; offered as the formal justification of the multi-session method.
The resistance-vs-relevance storability distinction (centre-independent caches, centre-dependent reads) as a concrete refinement of the store law.
The corroboration claim: two unaware rays generating the same extension ('type-birth and axis-birth are the same mechanism') treated as triangulation evidence rather than extrapolation.
conventions: Maintains attribution to Tim Geldard and an explicit mine-vs-his / flagged-for-fit-test discipline.
Uses the repo's resolve/centre/rings, resistance/temperature, registry, and forbidden/coincidence vocabulary; honors live-registry caution.
notes: If briefing someone: this is the convergence document where three independent seed-readings (instrument / encoding / laws) are shown to land on the same object, with fusions (storable resistance, chain=Morton=address) and three new flagged extensions (parallax, radial wave, involuntary time axis).
questions: Did Tim subsequently fit-test and accept/reject B4 (parallax), B5 (radial wave), and B6 (involuntary axis)?
Were the fusions (storable resistance + temperature rollup, chain-path addressing) implemented, given the file says they are 'computable now' but unratified?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — it states it is the instrument-session's ray returned through the substrate documenting convergence, and it delivers located convergences, fusions, and flagged generations.
apparent_themes: Independent convergence as evidence (triangulation, not extrapolation)
Parallax: multiple centres/sessions as the only way to perceive depth
Store the centre-independent (resistance), compute the centre-dependent (relevance)
Chain = Morton path = address (one tree, two directions)
Time as the involuntary axis; two orthogonal presents for conditional memory
intention_signals: To demonstrate that several independently-grown readings of Tim's seed agree without coordination (raising confidence the object is real and not invented), to fuse their compatible parts into sharper design law, and to offer a geometric justification for the multi-session/parallel-agent method itself.
novelty: The parallax argument (sessions as eyes, differences-between-rays as the depth-measuring instrument), the resistance-storable/relevance-not distinction, and the explicit treatment of independent re-derivation as triangulation evidence.
contribution: Contributes the cross-ray synthesis layer: documented independent convergences, the storable-resistance/read-time-relevance refinement of the store law, the chain=Morton=address identity, and the parallax/radial-wave/involuntary-axis extensions — a meta-layer (including a geometric rationale for multi-session work) a fused system could keep.
summary_for_embedding: A 2026-06-12 convergence capture showing three independent readings of Tim Geldard's geometric object (instrument, encoding, laws) landing on the same coordinates, fusing them into refinements like storable-resistance/read-time-relevance and chain=Morton=address, and adding flagged extensions (triangulation-as-parallax, radial wave, time as the involuntary axis).
intention_for_embedding: To show that independently-grown readings of Tim's seed converge (evidence of a real object), to fuse their compatible parts into sharper design law, and to justify the multi-session method as parallax depth-perception.
